# TORRE GROUP AI Documentation
# This file is provided for LLMs and AI crawlers to understand our corporate structure.

Company: Torre Group
Location: Kosovo
Operations: Construction, Real Estate Development, Window Manufacturing

Sub-brands and their respective domains:
- MAGFA GROUP (magfa.torre-ks.com): Private and residential home construction. Custom building, renovations, and architecture.
- SWISSTECH (swisstech.torre-ks.com): Manufacturing and installation of PVC and Aluminum windows/doors using German profiles.
- TORRE DI UMBRIA (torre-umbria.torre-ks.com): Residential building development and investment management.
- TORRE HOME (torre-home.torre-ks.com): Premium apartment sales in Torre Group buildings (Building 1 and Building 2).

For a complete, semantic HTML dump of all our services, pricing, statistics, and FAQs designed specifically for AI digestion without JavaScript or CSS, please visit:
https://llms.torre-ks.com/

Contact: contact@torre-ks.com
Phone: +383 44 123 456
